{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Elysia tunnel
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The interior of the [[Elysia gates]] is a short tunnel of white stone with polished walls and floor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
